competitors.name: dbdiagram.io
competitors.pricing: Free (10 diagrams) / $8/mo Pro / $75/mo Team / Enterprise custom
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools uses open Mermaid standard (not proprietary DBML), supports bidirectional conversion, and ships as NuGet + CLI + REST API — not just a browser app
competitors.notes: Most popular browser-based ERD tool using proprietary DBML DSL. Strong brand, collaboration features, AI assistant in Pro tier. No embeddable library or API.

competitors.name: ChartDB
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools produces portable Mermaid markup for GitHub/GitLab/Notion rendering and supports 31+ SQL dialects vs ChartDB's 5
competitors.notes: Open-source database design editor (19K+ GitHub stars). Supports MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, SQLite. AI-powered diagrams and real-time collaboration. Proprietary visual format, not Mermaid.

competitors.name: GraphMyDB
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools provides NuGet package, CLI, and REST API for CI/CD integration; GraphMyDB is visual-only with no programmatic output
competitors.notes: Free browser-based SQL schema visualizer. Accepts MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite dumps, CSV, JSON, Excel. Live collaboration (up to 4 users), VS Code extension, schema comparison.

competitors.name: DiagramDB
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools offers NuGet library for embedding in .NET apps, CLI for scripting, and REST API; DiagramDB is browser-only with no offline capability
competitors.notes: Browser-based SQL formatting, syntax validation, and ERD generation. SQL-to-ERD conversion with no signup required. Simple web tool with no API.

competitors.name: XDevUtilities SQL to Mermaid
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools provides bidirectional conversion, 31+ dialects, and multi-surface delivery (NuGet/CLI/API/VS Code); XDevUtilities is one-way web-only
competitors.notes: Converts CREATE TABLE statements into Mermaid ER diagrams. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, SQLite. Zero storage policy. One-way conversion only.

competitors.name: sql2mermaid-cli
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools is .NET-native (NuGet), bidirectional, supports 31+ dialects, and includes REST API and VS Code extension; sql2mermaid-cli is Python-only and one-way
competitors.notes: Python CLI tool that converts SQL queries into Mermaid format. Installable via pip. Saves output as plain text or markdown. Requires Python >= 3.8.1.

competitors.name: Mermaid JS ERD to SQL (VS Code Extension)
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools does both directions (SQL-to-Mermaid and Mermaid-to-SQL) across 31+ dialects; this extension only converts Mermaid-to-SQL for 3 dialects
competitors.notes: VS Code extension that converts Mermaid ERD markup to SQL DDL. Supports MySQL, SQLite, Postgres. Automatic FK generation and composite key support. Reverse-direction only.

competitors.name: SchemaCrawler
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools parses DDL text directly without a database connection and runs on .NET; SchemaCrawler requires a live JDBC database connection and Java runtime
competitors.notes: Java-based database schema discovery tool. Generates ERD via Graphviz (PNG, SVG) with export to Mermaid, PlantUML, dbdiagram.io. Schema linting, regex filtering. Works with any JDBC database.

competitors.name: DevToolkits SQL to ER
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools is commercial-grade with 31+ dialects, NuGet/CLI/REST API/VS Code; DevToolkits is a hobby project with limited dialect support
competitors.notes: Browser-based tool built with Astro and TypeScript. Generates Mermaid ER diagrams from DDL. Client-side processing using regex-based DDL parsing.

competitors.name: Tusharad SQL to Mermaid ER
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMermaidErdTools supports 31+ SQL dialects and bidirectional conversion with professional tooling; Tusharad is a single-dialect (PostgreSQL) hobby converter
competitors.notes: Simple web-based converter for PostgreSQL queries to Mermaid diagram format. Single-dialect hobby project.
